calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Wake County Public School System in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Wake County Public School System (WCPSS) is Monday, August 24, 2026. Teacher workdays run August 17–21 the week before students arrive.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Wake County Public School System in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Wake County Public School System is Wednesday, June 9, 2027. The school year runs from August through June, covering 185 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Wake County Public School System?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Wake County Public School System runs March 29–April 2, 2027 — 5 days, shorter than the 8-day break in 2025–2026. Good Friday (March 26) is a school holiday immediately before spring break, creating a 6-consecutive-day no-school window from Friday March 26 through Friday April 2.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2026-2027 for Wake County Public School System?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Wake County Public School System runs December 21, 2026–January 1, 2027 (12 days). School resumes Monday, January 4, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2026-2027 for Wake County Public School System?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Wake County Public School System runs November 25–27, 2026 (Wednesday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 26. School resumes Monday, November 30, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Shorter
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break shrinks from 8 days (Mar 30–Apr 6) in 2025–2026 to 5 days (Mar 29–Apr 2) this year.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday added as a school holiday immediately before Spring Break — not observed in 2025–2026.

calendarNotes: The Wake County Public School System (WCPSS) 2026–2027 traditional calendar includes an August 24 start date, a week-long Winter Break, a March–April Spring Break, and a June 9 last day of school. The traditional calendar begins on August 24, 2026, following teacher workdays from August 17–21. Thanksgiving Break is scheduled for November 25–27, while Winter Break runs from December 21, 2026, through January 1, 2027, with classes resuming on January 4. Good Friday, observed on March 26, is a school holiday immediately before Spring Break, which runs from March 29 to April 2. Classes resume on April 6 following a teacher workday on April 5. The traditional-calendar school year concludes for students on June 9, 2027.
